items.title: An AI agent startup just let its agent run its $100M fundraise
items.summary: Lyzr, a startup that builds AI agents for enterprises, used its own AI agent to raise a $100 million round — proof, evidently, that the product actually works.

items.title: Venice.ai Snares $65M Series A Funding
items.summary: SHERIDAN, WY, Venice.ai, a privacy-focused AI startup,has raised $65 million in its first outside funding, valuing the startup at $1 billion.
